<!-- Choose one: 6+ / 9+ -->

### Description / 描述

<!-- Describe the puzzle concept. What does the child see? What do they need to figure out? -->
<!-- 描述题目概念。孩子看到什么？需要思考什么？ -->

### Why is it fun? / 为什么有趣？

<!-- What makes this puzzle engaging for a child? Is there a surprise? A discovery moment? -->
<!-- 这道题为什么能吸引孩子？有惊喜吗？有发现时刻吗？ -->

### Real-world connection / 现实世界联系

<!-- How does this puzzle connect to something kids see in real life? -->
<!-- 这道题如何与孩子在现实生活中看到的事物建立联系？ -->

### Example (optional) / 示例（可选）

<!-- If you can, sketch out what the puzzle might look like. Text description, ASCII art, or a link to a drawing — anything helps! -->

### Hints idea (optional) / 提示思路（可选）

<!-- Suggest 2-3 hints that go from abstract to concrete -->
<!-- 建议 2-3 个从抽象到具体的提示 -->
